title: Hornet Removal in Orange, NJ | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Orange, NJ. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Orange homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Orange, New Jersey residents facing hornet infestations can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for fast, professional removal services. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from homes and businesses throughout Orange, protecting your family and property. We offer competitive pricing between $350-$550 with same-day service available.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Orange and the surrounding Essex County area. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate hornets quickly while providing guaranteed results and exceptional customer service to Orange residents.
localContext: Orange's mix of historic Victorian homes, multi-family residences, and tree-lined streets near places like Orange Park and the Valley Arts District creates ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, attics, and mature trees. Our team is familiar with the unique architecture and landscaping throughout Orange neighborhoods, from Main Street to the Highland Avenue corridor, ensuring thorough nest removal tailored to your property type.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Orange typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for hornet removal in Orange. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on the nest's location and size. Emergency services are available for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my Orange home and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families, pets, and the environment. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in safe hornet removal techniques, taking all necessary precautions to protect your Orange property.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps and yellow jackets, typically building large paper nests in trees or under eaves. While all three can sting, hornets are more aggressive when defending their nests. Our Orange team can identify the species and use the appropriate removal method for your situation.
